text.title: Internal Developer Platform (IDP) Core Model Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: IDP MUST be run as a product (PM, roadmap, NPS) — not as a one-shot project.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Charter MUST list ≥2 explicit personas (dev / SRE / Sec / Finance) with their top pains.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Capability inventory MUST cover ≥4 areas: provisioning, observability, security, cost.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Success metrics MUST include DORA quartet + platform adoption rate.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Platform team MUST have ≥3 dedicated engineers; "some-SRE-on-the-side" is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when org <20 engineers OR no leadership funding commitment.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
